last_action: Finalized Admin Security Hardening and Mobile UX Refinement for Meter Recording.
summary: Phase 9: Security Hardening and UX Refinement. Admin passwords migrated to PBKDF2 hashing. Implemented 'Magic Link' (Auto-login) and 'Pairing Code' systems for secure, password-less LINE integration. Optimized Bulk and Single meter entry for mobile, adding historical context (เดิม: XXX) and ensuring real-time data synchronization between modes. Resolved critical bugs related to float conversion, API field naming, and mobile layout overflows.
next_steps: Perform final security audit on Magic Link token entropy.
Draft updated Admin User Guide covering LINE pairing and Magic Links.
Prepare deployment environment for production transition.
